name: Frame Target
description: Create a fully-constrained FrameTarget from a Rhino plane or COMPAS Frame. The target_mode selects which frame on the robot/tool/workpiece must match the target.

inputParameters.name: plane
inputParameters.description: Rhino plane or COMPAS Frame describing the target pose (in WCF).

inputParameters.name: target_mode
inputParameters.description: Which frame on the robot to match. One of 'ROBOT' (PCF, default), 'TOOL' (TCF of attached tool), or 'WORKPIECE' (OCF of attached workpiece).

inputParameters.name: tolerance_position
inputParameters.description: Position tolerance in meters (not affected by native_scale). If unset, the planner default is used.

inputParameters.name: tolerance_orientation
inputParameters.description: Orientation tolerance in radians. If unset, the planner default is used.

inputParameters.name: native_scale
inputParameters.description: Scale factor: user_value * native_scale = meters. Use 0.001 if modeling in millimeters. Defaults to 1.0.
